name: id
description: Unique product identifier (UUID from the source system)

name: price
description: Product price (parsed from stringified float; NUMERIC avoids binary float rounding for money)

name: last_update
description: Timestamp of last update in the source system; NULL if the source format could not be parsed

name: last_update_raw
description: Original last_update string as received, kept as fallback for unparseable formats

name: message_id
description: Pub/Sub message id, for traceability back to products_raw

name: ingested_at
description: Time the row was written by the pipeline (partitioning column)
